name: Lake Forest Bank & Trust Company, National Association
description_short: Lake Forest Bank & Trust Company is a full-service national bank offering personal banking, small business, and commercial services across multiple account and lending products.
description_long:
Lake Forest Bank & Trust Company, National Association is a community-focused national bank that operates as part of the Wintrust Financial Corporation family of community banks. The bank has established itself as a regional financial institution serving personal, small business, and commercial clients through multiple physical locations and digital banking channels.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, credit cards, mortgages, home equity lines of credit, and wealth management services. For small business clients, they provide business checking and savings accounts, cash management solutions, SBA loans, business lending, and commercial real estate financing. Their commercial division serves larger enterprises with asset-based lending, capital markets access, commercial leasing, treasury management, and industry-specific solutions for sectors including construction, franchises, and government entities.

Lake Forest Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on community banking and personalized service. The institution offers specialized programs like the Platinum Adventures® Club and Junior Savers Club®, conducts financial education initiatives, and hosts local events. They position themselves as part of the broader Wintrust ecosystem, which allows clients to access resources beyond traditional banking including retirement benefits advisory and employee stock ownership plan (ESOP) financing.

As a national bank, Lake Forest Bank & Trust provides the regulatory backing and deposit insurance protection of FDIC membership (implied through national charter). However, the website provides limited specific information about account terms, interest rates, fees, or detailed product specifications. Customers would need to contact the bank directly or visit in person to obtain detailed pricing and feature comparisons for most products. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Credit building and credit repair resources
Wealth management and retirement planning advisory
pros: Full-service banking with personal, small business, and commercial divisions under one institution
Specialized commercial services including asset-based lending, capital markets access, and international services
Community-oriented programs including Platinum Adventures® Club, Junior Savers Club®, and local financial education
SBA lending expertise available for both small business and commercial clients
Digital and mobile banking capabilities alongside physical branch locations
Comprehensive wealth management and private client services
Access to broader Wintrust Financial Corporation resources and sister bank services
cons: Website lacks specific details on interest rates, APYs, and fee structures for products
No transparent pricing information for mortgages, credit cards, or lending products visible on main site
Limited information about minimum account balances or account opening requirements
Website does not clearly display current promotions or account opening bonuses
No online account opening flow visible or simplified application process described

contact.address: 727 N Bank Ln, Lake Forest, IL 60045

best_for: Small business owners seeking comprehensive banking and SBA lending solutions
Commercial enterprises requiring asset-based lending and treasury management services
Individual consumers looking for relationship-based community banking with personal service
High-net-worth individuals seeking wealth management and private client services
diagnosis: Lake Forest Bank & Trust is best for consumers and businesses seeking comprehensive, relationship-based community banking with access to specialized commercial services and wealth management. The primary caveat is that the bank's website provides limited transparency on pricing, rates, and fees—potential customers must contact the bank directly to compare products competitively.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 727 N Bank Ln, Lake Forest, IL 60045
